who: restaurant kitchen managers processing 5–15 inventory reports/week
offer: For restaurant kitchen managers processing 5–15 inventory reports/week, inaccurate inventory tracking causes overstocking and waste. We provide weekly inventory usage reports instead of manual tracking and spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate inventory tracking leads to overstocking and waste.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for restaurant kitchen managers
Indie Hackers discussions on inventory management
DM outreach to restaurant kitchen managers with demo video
Community forums for restaurant kitchen managers sharing tools
try_it: Let users try weekly inventory report generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing inventory data
